summary: Frontend UI testing completed successfully for all dashboard pages. UI redesign with blue brand colors (#2563EB) is correctly implemented. All features working: login, dashboard overview, tests list, test detail with performance metrics, history with export, analytics.
critical_code_review_comments: UI redesign with blue theme (#2563EB) correctly applied throughout the app
Dashboard cards display correctly with clean seoitis-style design
All navigation links and Quick Actions buttons work as expected
Test detail page shows performance score and Core Web Vitals (FCP, LCP, CLS)
History page has search, filters (Status, Test Type, Device), and Export CSV functionality
Analytics page shows metrics cards with time range selector and CSV/PDF export options
seed_data_creation: 6 test records exist from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages tested successfully. Blue brand theme applied correctly. Dashboard shows: Total Tests (6), This Month (0), Avg Performance (99%), Critical Issues (0). Quick Actions (Run New Test, Schedule Test, View Reports) all navigate correctly. Test detail page shows Performance Score with Core Web Vitals metrics.
